mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL /* @SQLID=SUB0204_01-02_2#Sql015 */ INTO BB_ACCEPT ( BB_PRODUCT_CODE, BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, BB_BRANCH_CODE, BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, BB_DEALER_NUMBER, BB_FAMILY_NAME_KANJI, BB_NAME_KANJI, BB_FAMILY_NAME_KANA, BB_NAME_KANA, BB_QUANTITY, BB_PRICE, BB_DISCOUNT, BB_SEQ, BB_INVESTOR_ATT_NAME, BB_REMARK, BB_CREATE_DATE, BB_CREATE_USER_ID, BB_CREATE_SECTION_ID, BB_CREATE_SECTION_NAME, BB_CREATE_USER_NAME, BB_WINNING, BB_WINNING_ORDER, BB_QUANTITY_ALLOC, BB_EXCLUSION, BB_EXCLUSION_REASON, BB_STRIKE_PRICE ) VALUES( #{req.brandCode}, TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}), UPPER(#{req.butenCode}), LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, 0), #{req.dealerNumber}, #{req.customerLastNameKanji}, #{req.customerFirstNameKanji}, #{req.customerLastNameKana}, #{req.customerFirstNameKana}, TO_NUMBER(#{req.quantity}), DECODE(#{req.price}, null, null, TO_NUMBER(#{req.price})), DECODE(#{req.discountRate}, null, null, TO_NUMBER(#{req.discountRate})), TO_NUMBER(#{req.investorAttributeValue}), #{req.investorAttributeName}, #{req.bbRemark}, CORDYS.IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, #{req.sectionId}, #{req.branchName}, #{req.userName}, '0', NULL, NULL, '0', NULL, NVL(#{req.marketOrder}, 0) )
INTO SR_ACCEPT ( BB_PRODUCT_CODE, BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, BB_BRANCH_CODE, BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, BB_QUANTITY, QUANTITY_SAIRYOU, CHOSE_REASON, SAIRYOU_ALLO_QUANTITY, SR_CREATE_DATE, SR_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES( #{req.brandCode}, TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}), UPPER(#{req.butenCode}), LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, 0), TO_NUMBER(#{req.quantity}), DECODE(#{req.discretionQuantity}, null, null, TO_NUMBER(#{req.discretionQuantity})), #{req.selectReason}, NULL, CORDYS.IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
